title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB912R-2nD-LTm, LtAP mini
description: The LtAP mini is a small watherproof wireless access point with a prepared miniPCI-e slot for cellular modem supports 2G,3G and 4G (LTE) connectivity. In black case are prepared 2 LTE antennas with u.Fl connector and 3,5dBi gain Connect to the LtAP mini's built-in 802.11b/g/n wireless and access the LTE network from your phone or any other wireless device. The LtAP mini also has one 10/100 Ethernet LAN port for your wired devices. The RS232 serial port gives you console access for debugging 2.4 GHz AP in a rugged case miniPCIe for LTE Two SIM slots Built in GPS Serial port for other devices Perfect for cars or outdoor mobile applications Device (w/o LTE card) Power adapter 24V/1.2A PoE injector
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] < 2 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Serial port RS-232 MiniPCI-e slots 1 SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 GPS modul Yes Power Power over Ethernet 10 .. 57V DC Power type DC connector, PoE, USB (5V) PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 9 Power via connector/terminal 5V DC, 8 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop, Outdoor Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 139 Height [mm] 29 Depth [mm] 77 Hardware CPU QCA9531 CPU frequency [MHz] 650 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 64
